examples: Occasionally they paid for their indiscretion with their lives.
He talked to the press in a moment of indiscretion.
Older and wiser now, Burchill chalked up the incident to youthful indiscretion.
Innovation, largely a product of youthful indiscretion, also will continue to emerge more quickly stateside.
First, Harewood followed up to net after Taylor blocked his penalty following Latka's indiscretion.
